intro: A plain roundup of the week's notable military and business technology (full analysis was unavailable this run).

deep_dives.title: Two U.S. Troops Killed In Iranian Barrage On Base In Jordan (Updated)
deep_dives.what_happened: Jordan is a key host of U.S. troops, with Muwaffaq Salti Air Base housing the largest contingent of American tactical airpower in the entire Middle East. The post Two U.S. Troops Killed In Iranian Barrage On Base In Jordan (Updated) appeared first on TWZ .

deep_dives.title: 2 US troops killed, 1 missing after Iranian missile, drone attack in Jordan
deep_dives.what_happened: Two U.S. service members were killed in action on Friday in an Iranian ballistic missile and drone attack on U.S. and partner forces in Jordan.

deep_dives.title: Bunker Talk: Let’s Talk About All The Things We Did And Didn’t Cover This Week
deep_dives.what_happened: Is it getting more humid in here? The post Bunker Talk: Let’s Talk About All The Things We Did And Didn’t Cover This Week appeared first on TWZ .

deep_dives.title: Navy, Army risk wasting money, time without unified hypersonic missile strategy: GAO
deep_dives.what_happened: The GAO determined that the Navy is already roughly two years behind schedule on modernizing the Zumwalt-class destroyers as part of the more than $50 billion hypersonic effort.

deep_dives.title: U.S.-Iran Fight Heats Up With Mutual Strikes On Infrastructure Targets
deep_dives.what_happened: More U.S. Air Force tankers and fighters head to the Middle East as the conflict intensifies. The post U.S.-Iran Fight Heats Up With Mutual Strikes On Infrastructure Targets appeared first on TWZ .

deep_dives.title: USS Zumwalt Set To Return To Fleet After Long Anticipated Hypersonic Missile Upgrade
deep_dives.what_happened: Issues tied to Zumwalt's hugely powerful hybrid-electric power plant and other factors have set back its return to the fleet. The post USS Zumwalt Set To Return To Fleet After Long Anticipated Hypersonic Missile Upgrade appeared first on TWZ .

deep_dives.title: US Navy 2 years behind on hypersonic missile installation on Zumwalt destroyers
deep_dives.what_happened: The U.S. Navy’s expensive effort to install hypersonic missiles on three Zumwalt-class destroyers is two years behind schedule.

deep_dives.title: Saronic picks Brownsville, Texas, for $3 billion Port Alpha shipyard
deep_dives.what_happened: Autonomous vessel maker Saronic is set to build Port Alpha, a shipyard the company describes as the most advanced in the world, in Texas.

disclaimer: The watchlist is informational only and not financial advice.
